queries.question: Show all filmmakers and screenwriters from youngest to oldest.
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): no-FROM gold 'SELECT name'; NL intent = all authors = Filmmaker.name UNION Scree

queries.question: Show all filmmakers and screenwriters from youngest to oldest.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?birth_year WHERE {
  ?filmmaker a :Filmmaker .
  ?filmmaker p:name ?name .
  ?filmmaker p:birth_year ?birth_year .
}

queries.question: Show all filmmakers and screenwriters from youngest to oldest.
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?birth_year WHERE {
  ?screenwriter a :Screenwriter .
  ?screenwriter p:name ?name .
  ?screenwriter p:birth_year ?birth_year .
}

queries.question: How many filmmakers and screenwriters were born before or in 1970?
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT name, birth_year FROM Filmmaker UNION SELECT name, birth_year FROM Screenwriter) WHERE birth_year <= 1970;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?n) WHERE { { SELECT DISTINCT ?nm ?by WHERE { { ?x a :Filmmaker ; p:name ?nm ; p:birth_year ?by } UNION { ?y a :Screenwriter ; p:name ?nm ; p:birth_year ?by } FILTER(xsd:integer(?by) <= 1970) } } }
queries.note: override OK (NL-intent GT): COUNT(*) FROM (Filmmaker UNION Screenwriter) WHERE birth_year<=1970 -> COUNT ove

queries.question: How many authors were born before or in 1970?
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Filmmaker WHERE birth_year <= 1970;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?filmmaker a :Filmmaker .
  ?filmmaker p:birth_year ?birth_year_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?birth_year_f) <= 1970)
}

queries.question: How many authors were born before or in 1970?
queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Screenwriter WHERE birth_year <= 1970;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT (COUNT(*) AS ?agg) WHERE {
  ?screenwriter a :Screenwriter .
  ?screenwriter p:birth_year ?birth_year_f .
  FILTER(xsd:double(?birth_year_f) <= 1970)
}

queries.question: Show all filmmakers from youngest to oldest.
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Filmmaker ORDER BY Filmmaker.birth_year DESC;
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {
  ?filmmaker a :Filmmaker .
  ?filmmaker p:name ?name .
  ?filmmaker p:birth_year ?birth_year_o .
}
ORDER BY DESC(?birth_year_o)

queries.question: Show all screenwriters from youngest to oldest.
queries.sql: SELECT name FROM Screenwriter ORDER BY Screenwriter.birth_year DESC;
queries.sparql:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name WHERE {

  ?screenwriter p:name ?name .
  ?screenwriter p:birth_year ?birth_year_o .

ORDER BY DESC(?birth_year_o)

ambiguous_dsl.question: How many authors were born before or in 1970?
